description: A dropdown for selecting a single value from a list of options. Use Select.Combobox for searchable/filterable selection, and Select.Multi or Select.Combobox.Multiple for multi-value selection.
instructions: Use Select for simple single-value selection. Use Select.Combobox when users need to search or filter the options list. Use Select.Multi or Select.Combobox.Multiple for multi-value selection. Group options with Select.Group. Use Select.Slot to add icons to items. Use Dropdown instead when items trigger actions rather than selecting a value.
name: Select
